title: ICICI Direct Holdings Services is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: ICICI Direct Holdings Services is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Direct Holdings Services! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Bhopal team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Direct Holdings Services:
ICICI Direct Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Direct Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
